name: Ginger-Glazed Carrots
recipeIngredient: 8 medium carrots, cut into 1/4 inch slices (4 cups)
1/2 cup dry white wine or apple juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook all ingredients except lemon juice and brown sugar in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat for 12 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the liquid has evaporated.
2. Reduce heat to medium-low.
3. Stir in lemon juice and brown sugar. Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the carrots are glazed.
4. Makes 6 servings.
